lead: AI technology continues to evolve rapidly, impacting various sectors from cloud computing to fashion, while raising critical discussions around ethics and governance.

stories.title: Build Club launches a free virtual AI school, Campus
stories.summary: Build Club has introduced Campus, a free virtual AI school aimed at enhancing AI skills among learners. This initiative focuses on providing resources for individuals to learn, build, and get certified in AI technologies, reflecting a growing trend towards democratizing AI education.

stories.title: Nvidia RTX Spark May Light a Fire for Windows on Arm
stories.summary: Nvidia's new SoC, the RTX Spark, promises exceptional performance for gaming and generative AI applications on Windows devices. This chip is expected to significantly enhance the capabilities of Windows on Arm, marking a pivotal moment for the platform.

stories.title: Making sense of the debate over AI psychosis
stories.summary: The latest episode of Equity delves into the controversial topic of 'AI psychosis,' discussing whether tech CEOs are particularly susceptible to this phenomenon. The conversation highlights the psychological implications of rapid AI advancements and their impact on leadership.

stories.title: How AI is changing online shopping
stories.summary: AI-generated models are transforming the fashion industry, as seen in a recent experiment by an Australian e-commerce retailer. This approach not only enhances marketing strategies but also raises questions about authenticity and consumer trust in AI-generated imagery.

stories.title: Wix cuts 1,000 employees in latest AI-fueled layoff
stories.summary: Wix has announced a significant layoff affecting 20% of its workforce, attributing the decision to the increasing integration of AI technologies. This move highlights the ongoing trend of companies restructuring in response to automation and AI advancements.

stories.title: China just told its tech giants to stop fighting on price and start investing in AI
stories.summary: China's Communist Party has shifted its focus towards encouraging major tech companies to invest in AI rather than engage in price wars. This strategic pivot aims to foster innovation and ensure sustainable growth in the AI sector.

stories.title: SoftBank overtakes Toyota as Japan’s most valuable company on the AI rally
stories.summary: SoftBank has surpassed Toyota to become Japan's most valuable company, driven by its substantial investments in AI, particularly its stake in OpenAI. This shift underscores the financial market's growing confidence in AI technologies.

stories.title: Team Global Express has the logistics for AI use in place
stories.summary: Team Global Express has successfully integrated AI agents into its logistics operations, marking a significant step towards automating and optimizing supply chain processes. This development demonstrates the practical applications of AI in enhancing operational efficiency.
